title: Medieval Craft
description: The modpack is set in the medieval era. Here, you will encounter villages from that time, explore breathtaking locations, battle historical groups such as the Normans, and face legendary monsters and bosses.
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a7200144493553bea78c2cd0b637dbac36ec28d6.png)

____________________________________________________________________________________________

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/7SkdGxv2v3k" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


## **DESCRIPTION**

The modpack is set in the medieval era, as you may have guessed. Here, you will encounter villages from that time, explore breathtaking locations, battle historical groups such as the Normans, and face legendary monsters and bosses.


## **LORE**

You are destined to conquer the entire kingdom, but you don’t know it yet. Banished from your village, you must start over from scratch. Your journey begins as you gather resources, equip yourself, and train to become a knight. From there, your adventure unfolds as you slay legendary monsters and defeat the Norman factions to prove to everyone that you are the true lord of this realm. You will establish cities and castles, conquering many more, until everything around you belongs to you!


## **RESOURCES**


All mods, resource packs, data packs and shaders!

## **OPTIMIZATION**

We have added a performance optimization system for Forge, even with shaders, by including mods such as **Oculus, Radium, and Embeddium**. This ensures a smooth experience with enhanced graphics, maintaining over **60 FPS** for an optimal gameplay experience*.

  *Game performance obviously depends on the computer it is running on. Our tests were          conducted using RTX 3060 and RTX 4070 graphics cards.


## **TECHNICAL NOTES**

The modpack uses First-Person Model, which can be disabled by pressing the **F6** key on your keyboard.
Additionally, we remind you to manually enable all pre-installed texture packs to ensure the best possible gaming experience.
